# GUI Framework — Overview

Blazor-inspired, Cairo-backed. Components declared in C# via `BuildRenderTree`. Lives in `src/UI-Tweaks/Gui/Framework/`.

**Key terms:** Component — unit of UI. RenderFragment — stable `delegate void(IGuiRenderTreeBuilder)` describing a subtree; `GuiRenderFragment<T>` is the parameterised counterpart `delegate void(IGuiRenderTreeBuilder, T)` (flat, not curried like Blazor's — saves an allocation per item per rebuild while keeping the same call-site DX). Builder — receives declarations, owns instances. Reconciler — diffs declarations vs live instances. Renderer — drives reconcile + render walk each frame.

```
Public/Components/Base/                   GuiNode                  lightweight base: render handle + render fragment + lifecycle + cascade lookups + BuildRenderTree hook + Render/RenderOverlay (no-op). No layout — use for layout-transparent decorators.
                                          GuiComponent : GuiNode   default base for layout-participating components; adds LayoutParameters + virtual Measure
Public/Components/Layout/                 GuiContainer : GuiComponent  general-purpose layout/surface ("the div"): hosts Content children; optional Background fill (default transparent → no draw); subclasses override DrawBackground (before children) + DrawOverlay (after children); base Render/RenderOverlay are sealed; defaults to FitContent
                                          GuiInset : GuiComponent      vanilla inset visual: optional dark brightness overlay + multi-pass embossed rounded-rectangle border; Depth controls ring passes, Brightness the fill overlay, Radius corner curvature; Content children render on top
                                          GuiShadow : GuiComponent     soft drop shadow: stack of offset, decreasing-alpha rounded rectangles toward bottom-right; Steps + Offset + Spread configurable; also exposes a static Draw helper for call sites that want the shadow without a tree slot (e.g. GuiSlider handle)
Public/Components/Display/                GuiLabel                     sealed leaf: renders a single text line via GuiFontStyle; Measure() returns intrinsic text size; default font = GuiFontStyle.Default
                                          GuiRectangle : GuiComponent  leaf: fills its bounds with a solid Color (GuiColor, default transparent → no-op draw); both axes default to FitContent
                                          GuiSeparator : GuiRectangle  sealed pre-styled horizontal rule: 1 px tall, widthMode = Fill, Color = GuiVanillaStyle.DialogTitleBarBgColor; all defaults restored by ResetLayoutParameters; use AddSeparator(key, margin?) extension
                                          GuiBreadcrumbs<T> : GuiComponent  horizontal breadcrumb trail: renders PreviousItems via ItemTemplate (GuiRenderFragment<T>) with " > " label separators, then CurrentItem via CurrentTemplate. With no PreviousItems collapses to a single-slot heading (CurrentTemplate only, with section-spacing bottom margin). Click and hover subscriptions belong inside ItemTemplate — chain OnMouseEnter/OnMouseLeave/OnMouseClick on any declared slot; the component wraps each item in a scoping container for key isolation only. RenderingItemIndex (protected) is set before each ItemTemplate call so subclass templates closing over `this` know which item index is currently rendering. Non-generic GuiBreadcrumbs : GuiBreadcrumbs<string> provides predefined ItemTemplate (HyperlinkColor label + HyperlinkHoverColor on hover + linkselect cursor + OnMouseClick → OnItemClicked action; hover tracking via a wrapper container owning all three events so the label itself carries no interactive region) and CurrentTemplate (LargeBold label).
Public/Components/Controls/               GuiButton                    sealed clickable: vanilla-style Normal button visuals; declares an inner GuiContainer with slot-level OnMouseDown/Up/Click; exposes Text, OnClick (GuiCallback), Enabled, NormalFont/PressedFont, HorizontalTextPadding/VerticalTextPadding, EmbossHeight, BackgroundColor
Public/Components/Dialog/                 GuiDialog                    base for Cairo dialogs; forwards mouse/keyboard events to DialogRenderer dispatchers; OffsetX/OffsetY (logical px from screen-centred default) control dialog position — mutated by drag; Move(deltaX, deltaY) adds a delta (pass as GuiDialogTitleBar.OnDrag to make the title bar drag the dialog); IsResizable enables bottom/right edge resize with Min/Max Width/Height bounds; protected virtual OnKeyDown/Up/Press(KeyEvent) for dialog-wide shortcuts; protected OnOpened/OnClosed/OnFocusChanged virtual hooks
                                          GuiDialogBackground : GuiContainer  vanilla shaded dialog body: solid FillColor fill + tiled Texture overlay + outer border stroke; configurable FillColor, Texture, TextureAlpha, TextureScale, BorderColor, BorderAlpha, BorderWidth + JoinedTopEdge flag (suppresses top stroke to butt against a title bar above)
                                          GuiDialogTitleBar : GuiContainer    vanilla shaded title bar: lighter solid fill + open three-sided border (left + top + right); Title text drawn directly by DrawBackground (vertical centering not yet in layout pass); JoinedBottomEdge on GuiDialogBackground closes the bottom; OnDrag (Action<double,double>?) — when set the bar acts as a drag handle: pass `this.Move` from a GuiDialog subclass to wire title-bar drag to the dialog's position (null by default — drag disabled)
                                          GuiDialogCloseIcon : GuiComponent   vanilla "X" close icon: cross + drop shadow drawn into the Cairo surface every frame; hover changes cross colour instead of vanilla's pre-baked texture overlay; exposes CrossSize + CrossLineWidth; bounds sized to fit the full visual (cross + shadow) exactly
Public/Components/Tooltip/                GuiTooltip : GuiNode         sealed layout-transparent wrapper: implements only IGuiNode (not IGuiComponent), so the layout pass inlines its Content children at the parent's flow and the wrapper itself occupies no space. In Render registers itself with the cascaded TooltipHost so the floating layer can draw TooltipContent over its bounds (= union of inner children along parent's flow axis)
                                          GuiTooltipBackground : GuiContainer  vanilla tooltip chrome: DialogStrongBgColor fill + DialogBorderColor stroke at width 3, radius 1, 5px padding (matches GuiElementHoverText.DefaultBackground)
Public/Components/Inputs/                 GuiInputBase : GuiComponent  shared input boilerplate: cascade-resolves FocusManager + declares an inner absolute-fill GuiContainer click target + tracks IsHovered/IsPressed/IsFocused/LastBounds; subclasses override OnInputClick / OnInputMouseDown / OnInputMouseUp / OnInputMouseMove plus Render for chrome
                                          GuiTextInput / GuiCheckbox / GuiSlider  sealed inputs over GuiInputBase
                                          GuiDropdown<T> : GuiInputBase  generic picker: header (selected-template + chevron) + a popup (GuiDropdownPopup, internal subclass of GuiTooltipBackground) listing rows via ItemTemplate (GuiRenderFragment<T>); falls back to item.ToString() label when no template; SelectedIndex is canonical state, Up/Down arrow keys navigate, Space/Enter toggle, Escape closes; auto-closes on focus loss; rebuild-on-hover for row highlight; extension hooks BuildHeader / BuildPopup / GetItemCount / GetItemAt for autocomplete-style overrides. Popup is hoisted onto the dialog's OverlayHost (see Internal/Renderers/) so it paints on its own Cairo surface, can hang off the dialog's edges without being clipped, and its rows always win the topmost-wins reverse hit-test. Non-generic GuiDropdown : GuiDropdown<string> exists for convenience.
Public/Interfaces/                        IGuiNode                     public minimal node contract: RenderFragment, Attach, lifecycle, Render/RenderOverlay. No layout — slots whose instance only implements this are layout-transparent (child builder inlined at parent's level, wrapper bounds = union of inner children)
                                          IGuiComponent : IGuiNode     public layout-participating contract: adds LayoutParameters + Measure
                                          IGuiRenderTreeBuilder        builder contract; exposes AddComponent<T> (internal, where T : IGuiNode) + PushCascadeScope<T> (internal, drives cascade scopes)
                                          IGuiComponentBuilder<T>      fluent slot handle (T : IGuiNode)
                                          IGuiRenderHandle             exposes StateHasChanged(fragment), TryGetCascadingValue<T>([name,] out T) — cascade lookups
                                          IGuiDialog : IGuiComponent   public; input-routing contract between GuiDialog and CairoDialogInputInterceptor; exposes RenderOrder, OffsetX/OffsetY, OnKeyDown/Up/Press, OnEscapePressed, OnFocus/UnFocus
Public/Enums/                             GuiHorizontalAlignment, GuiVerticalAlignment, GuiSizeMode, GuiDirection, GuiComponentPositioning, GuiSide, GuiScrollDirection, GuiTextInputMode
Public/Models/                            GuiComponentLayoutParameters, GuiMouseEventArgs (record struct: Position + AbsolutePosition — both GuiPoint in logical px; Button; body property WheelDelta — non-zero only for wheel events, zero for all click/move events), GuiKeyEventArgs (readonly struct — wraps vanilla KeyEvent; Handled flag propagates back to inner KeyEvent)
Public/Common/                            GuiComponentBounds, GuiThickness, GuiColor, GuiSize, GuiPoint (readonly record struct — X/Y in logical px; used as Position/AbsolutePosition in GuiMouseEventArgs), GuiFontStyle, GuiVanillaStyle (framework mirror of vanilla GuiStyle — all values pulled from GuiStyle at type-init so they never drift; covers: backgrounds: DialogLightBgColor/DefaultBgColor/StrongBgColor/BorderColor/DialogShadedStrokeColor/DialogTitleBarBgColor/DialogTitleBarHighlightColor; foregrounds: DialogDefaultTextColor/DarkBrownColor/DialogHighlightColor/DialogAlternateBgColor; buttons: ButtonBackColor/ButtonTextColor/ActiveButtonTextColor; status: SuccessTextColor/ErrorTextColor/WarningTextColor/LinkTextColor/HyperlinkColor/HyperlinkHoverColor; textures: DirtTexture/NoisyMetalTexture/WoodTexture/StoneTexture/WaterTexture/PaperTexture; dimensions: TitleBarHeight/DialogBgRadius/ElementBgRadius/ElementToDialogPadding/DialogToScreenPadding/HalfPadding; framework accent tokens: SwitchMarkColor (steel-blue #7AAEC2 — checkbox tick, slider mark), SliderFillColor (same hue at ~40% alpha for wide track fills)), TooltipHost (per-dialog tooltip controller, published as a root cascading value; wraps the tooltip FloatingLayerRenderer), OverlayHost (per-dialog overlay controller for popup-style content, published as a root cascading value; wraps the overlay FloatingLayerRenderer; Show(token, bounds, fragment) / Hide(token)), FocusManager (per-dialog focus controller, published as a root cascading value; RequestFocus(node) / Blur(); FocusedNode tracks focused IGuiNode by reference; framework auto-blurs on click-outside and dialog close), GuiCursorHost (per-dialog cursor controller, published as a root cascading value; SetHoverCursor(code) / null to clear; dialog reads HoverCursor after each mouse-move and forwards to vanilla MouseOverCursor; resize-edge cursors take priority), GuiCallback (readonly struct — value-type union of Action/Func<Task>, zero-allocation default), GuiCallback<T> (readonly struct — value-type union of Action<T>/Func<T,Task>)
Public/Extensions/                        RenderTreeBuilderExtensions  Add* slot declarations + AddButton/OnClick + AddCascadingValue<T> (void scope wrapper — no layout params, no key) + AddTooltip (wraps content; tooltip shown via cascaded TooltipHost; returns IGuiComponentBuilder<GuiTooltip> for chaining)
                                          ComponentBuilderExtensions   Configure (T : IGuiNode) / ConfigureLayout (T : IGuiComponent)
                                          MouseEventBuilderExtensions  OnMouseDown / OnMouseUp / OnMouseClick (T : IGuiNode; Action<T> + Func<T,Task> overloads)
                                          KeyEventBuilderExtensions    OnKeyDown / OnKeyUp / OnKeyPress (T : IGuiNode; Action<GuiKeyEventArgs> + Func<GuiKeyEventArgs,Task> overloads); keyboard events fire only on the currently focused slot (not spatially routed); handlers may set GuiKeyEventArgs.Handled to suppress framework fallbacks
                                          CairoContextExtensions       low-level Cairo drawing primitives: RoundRect (path append), fill/stroke helpers, SetPatternSource (tiled texture with counter-scaled CTM); all coordinates in logical pixels
Public/Delegates/                         GuiRenderFragment, GuiRenderFragment<T> (flat (builder, item) shape — see Key terms)
Internal/Services/                        GuiRenderTreeBuilder         reconciler + builder; PushCascadeScope<T> does a stack push/pop during blueprint phase; CascadeChain snapshotted per-frame; emits InteractiveRegions during render walk; layout pass branches on `slot.Instance is IGuiComponent` — pure IGuiNode slots are inlined at the parent's level
                                          DialogInputDispatcher        single class; owns the interactive-region list (used for both click/hover and scroll-wheel dispatch), keyboard-region list; handles all input routing directly: mouse hit-test (skips wheel-only regions via HasClickHandlers) + hover enter/leave state machine + capture state machine, scroll-wheel hit-test (finds topmost region with OnMouseWheel handler), keyboard dispatch to focused node + registered slot-level handlers, caret blink timer (Tick); exposes Tick / ClearPerFrameRegions / RefreshHoverIfNotCapturing / Add*Region / Dispatch* / SetFocusedNode
Internal/Renderers/                       GuiSurfaceRenderer           abstract base for any Cairo-backed component tree renderer: implements IRenderer (vanilla) + IDisposable; directly owns Cairo surface (ImageSurface + Context + LoadedTexture lifecycle) + GuiRenderTreeBuilder + IGuiRenderHandle, plus scale tracking and dirty flag; virtual members Schedule/Cancel/Add*Region/ContainsScreenPoint/OnRenderFrame — all no-op by default; protected methods EnsureSurfaceSize / DrawSurfaceContents / BlitAt / MarkDirty; internal SetCascadeChain
                                          DialogRenderer               frame-loop entry point; extends GuiSurfaceRenderer + IFloatingLayerInputHost; overrides RenderOrder → dialog's own order, OnRenderFrame → real frame loop, Schedule/Cancel → ScopedRebuildQueue, Add*Region → DialogInputDispatcher, ContainsScreenPoint → DialogScreenProjection; does NOT implement IFloatingLayer — it is a top-level renderer, not a driven sub-layer; owns DialogInputDispatcher + two FloatingLayerRenderer sub-layers (iterated via IFloatingLayer[] for the OnFrameStart / RunWalk / Render lifecycle)
                                          FloatingLayerRenderer        internal non-sealed driven sub-layer; extends GuiSurfaceRenderer + IFloatingLayer: active-fragment storage + Show/Hide/IsActive for external control; per-frame driven lifecycle (OnFrameStart / RunWalk / Render → Update + Blit); placement configured via FloatingLayerPlacement (Anchor, size constraints, InputHost for region forwarding, AutoClearWhenNotRefreshed, RewalkOnDialogWalk); the tooltip layer and overlay layer inside DialogRenderer are both FloatingLayerRenderer instances differentiated solely by their FloatingLayerPlacement
Internal/Interfaces/                      IFloatingLayer               internal; driven-layer lifecycle contract: OnFrameStart / RunWalk / Render / Dispose; implemented by FloatingLayerRenderer only; DialogRenderer holds IFloatingLayer[] for its sub-layers so it depends only on the lifecycle, not the surface infrastructure
                                          IFloatingLayerInputHost      internal; input-forwarding contract implemented by DialogRenderer; exposes AddInteractiveRegion / AddKeyboardRegion; overlay layers forward their hit regions to the host dialog's dispatcher via this interface
Internal/Models/                          RenderHandle, InteractiveRegion (internal; bounds + token + VirtualTarget + six mouse callbacks + OnMouseWheel; HasClickHandlers distinguishes click-capable from wheel-only registrations; Translated(dx,dy) offsets bounds and carries all callbacks), KeyboardRegion (internal readonly struct — slot identity token + OnKeyDown/Up/Press callbacks; no bounds, keyboard is not spatially routed), DialogScreenProjection (internal; dialog-local logical-px ↔ screen-px coordinate conversion), ScopedRebuildQueue (internal; per-frame queue of scoped StateHasChanged tokens, drained before the dirty walk), FloatingLayerPlacement (internal readonly record struct — placement config consumed by FloatingLayerRenderer: Anchor (FloatingLayerAnchor), FixedLogicalSize, MaxLogicalWidth/Height, InputHost (IFloatingLayerInputHost?), InputRegionOffsetX/Y, AutoClearWhenNotRefreshed, RewalkOnDialogWalk)
Internal/Common/                          CascadingValueChain (internal; immutable single-linked list of providers), GuiResizeCursors (internal static; lazy on-demand registration of resize-edge cursor sprites — ships NS/EW/diagonal PNGs that vanilla omits; EnsureLoaded(clientApi) is idempotent; exposes cursor-code constants Horizontal/Vertical/DiagonalNwSe)
Internal/Enums/                           GuiMouseEventKind (internal), GuiKeyEventKind (internal; Down/Up/Press), GuiResizeEdge (internal)
Internal/Delegates/                       FloatingLayerAnchor (internal; floating-layer position resolver: (physicalWidth, physicalHeight, scale, clientApi) → (posX, posY) physical-pixel top-left; all size/position params are double; consumed by FloatingLayerPlacement.Anchor)
Internal/Dialogs/                         VanillaGuiDialog             thin wrapper over VS GuiDialog; base for legacy dialogs + CairoDialogInputInterceptor
Internal/Interceptors/                    CairoDialogInputInterceptor  keeps DialogsOpened > 0 and routes input to IGuiDialog
Internal/Extensions/                      ClientApiExtensions          internal; reflection-based UnregisterDialog helper
```
